summary: Added severity ranking for suspicious rendered-crop dimension findings and a compact review-candidate list to the current output-integrity audit.

files_changed.why: Sorted suspicious dimension findings before failure examples are limited, and added suspicious_rendered_crop_review_candidates.
Extended the suspicious-dimension regression test to assert severity ordering and review candidates.

test_results: Initial targeted pytest run failed as expected because examples were record-ordered and review candidates were absent.
Final targeted pytest run passed: 13 passed.
Live output-integrity audit exited 1 due to 31 suspicious dimension candidates, now severity-ranked.
repo_hygiene_notes: No images, canonical JSON, or manifests were rewritten.
The ranked live audit report was written under this run's iteration folder.
known_risks: The ranking favors multiple reasons, then height, then aspect ratio. A visually worse but shorter crop could rank lower and still requires human review.
